pi_items.source: Task classification is subjective and not directly testable.
Task description instructs the user to act as an IT support specialist and build an IT support knowledge base.
Task description instructs the user to act as an 'IT support specialist', conceptually matching this occupation.
Explicitly listed in task.json description and enforced by export_result.sh and verifier.py logic.
Explicitly listed in task.json description ('tagged with \'IT-Support\'') and enforced by verifier.py logic.
Explicitly listed in task.json description ('Contain at least 100 words each') and checked by export_result.sh.
Explicitly listed in task.json description ('Create ALL of the following 6 tiddlers').

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to act as an IT support specialist and synthetically generate an IT knowledge base in TiddlyWiki. It must create exactly 6 tiddlers: 'IT Support - Master Index', 'IT Support - Network Connectivity', 'IT Support - Slow Performance', 'IT Support - Printer Problems', 'IT Support - Email Configuration', and 'IT Support - Quick Reference Commands'. Each tiddler must be tagged with 'IT-Support' and contain at least 100 words, all of which are explicitly required by the prompt and strictly verified by the environment scripts.
